title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Cursor's VP of Engineering discusses how the company deploys agent systems across the entire SDLC, from bug triage to security review to growth experimentation, to push past the 40% productivity plateau that most companies hit with AI coding assistants. The talk emphasizes that the bottleneck lies beyond code writing in broader workflow optimization and organizational change.
